message: Looking to trade all 20 rounds. Let's establish fair, consistent prices for mutual benefit.
Gap is 25 points. I'll move to 65 if you come down to 70. Let's split fairly and trade every round.
I appreciate the offer, but 70 is my absolute floor - trading at 67-68 midpoint wouldn't work for me. If you can bid 76+, I'll ask 76, giving us a solid 76 price. Let's both profit every
Good trade at 75. Let's keep trading every round - steady deals benefit us both. I'll stay competitive with my bids.
Agreed. I'll ask 75 every round. Let's trade consistently and both profit together.
